definition:
παρ-αιτέομαι, -οῦμαι 
 [in LXX for בָּקַשׁ pi., etc. ;] 
  1. to beg of or from another: Mrk.15:6 (Rec. ὅνπερ ᾐτοῦντο, see Field, Notes, 43). 
   2. to deprecate; 
   (a) prop., with neg., to entreat that not (Thuc., al.): Heb.12:19; 
   (b) to refuse, decline, avoid: o. accusative, 1Ti.4:7 5:11, 2Ti.2:23, Tit.3:10, Heb.12:25 (EV; but see Field, Notes, 234). 
   3. to beg off, ask to be excused, excuse (Polyb., al.) : Luk.14:18-19 (Heb.12:25, Field, l.with).†
 (AS)
